news.title: Anthropic Tops OpenAI to Become the World’s Most Valuable A.I. Start-Up
news.snippet: Anthropic raised $65 billion in new fund-raising that put its value at $900 billion, ahead of OpenAI’s last valuation of $730 billion, as the companies duel for A.I. dominance.

news.title: In Argentina, U.S. Tech Billionaire Peter Thiel Finds An Escape
news.snippet: The billionaire’s new roots in Argentina are said to be partly motivated by concerns about the future of the United States and shared beliefs with Argentina’s right-wing leader.

news.title: At the A.I. Epicenter, Technologists Dismiss Pope Leo’s Warnings About the New Technology
news.snippet: Pope Leo XIV’s spiritual message on artificial intelligence arrived as Silicon Valley’s A.I. enthusiasts pursue their own spirituality through technology.

news.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals Favorable Terms for Elon Musk
news.snippet: The ways it set up its board and Mr. Musk’s pay appear to benefit him at the expense of other shareholders, corporate governance experts said.

news.title: ‘The Maids,’ With Yerin Ha, Asks: Has Life Become One Big Performance?
news.snippet: In his rethinking of Jean Genet’s classic work about class and power, Kip Williams ponders “a world that gives you every opportunity not to be yourself.”

news.title: Massachusetts Uber and Lyft Drivers Form First Union for Ride-Share Workers
news.snippet: The App Drivers Union said it was the first organization in the country to be formally certified to represent drivers for apps such as Uber and Lyft.

news.title: As A.I. Fever Rises in Silicon Valley, Pope Leo Has a Few Words
news.snippet: The American pope wants to take artificial intelligence down a notch. Is he challenging the tech companies, or will tech take over the papacy?

news.title: UK Institute Is Hunting for Dangers Lurking in AI
news.snippet: The government’s A.I. Security Institute, staffed by alumni from OpenAI and Google, is becoming a model for countries grappling with A.I.’s emerging risks.

news.title: One Job That Is Growing in the A.I. Era? Cybersecurity Experts.
news.snippet: Demand for security engineers has surged as artificial intelligence generates a glut of new code and models like Anthropic’s Mythos create new concerns.

news.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
news.snippet: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"

news.title: Meta repeatedly snubs EU body over Facebook and Instagram user bans
news.snippet: The BBC has been contacted by hundreds of users who claimed they had been wrongly banned from the sites.

news.title: Porn company fined £600,000 by Ofcom over age check failings
news.snippet: Ofcom said Youngtek Solutions Ltd did not have checks between July and September 2025, but has since brought in verification.

news.title: Champion ethical hacker warns AI tools like Mythos will make competing harder
news.snippet: Chompie, one of the world's tops ethical hackers, says AI like Claude Mythos will make it harder for people like her to compete.

news.title: Instagram betting ads featuring Kane and Haaland banned
news.snippet: The advertising watchdog said the adverts featuring top footballers had a strong appeal to under-18s.

news.title: Starmer vows to act on social media after meeting bereaved parents
news.snippet: Some parents believe whether the government will take strong enough action remains to be seen.

news.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
news.snippet: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

news.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
news.snippet: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

news.title: Tech Life
news.snippet: What is the role of a teacher once AI arrives in the school classroom?

news.title: The GOP’s Attacks on James Talarico Are Straight Out of the Incel Handbook
news.snippet: Claims about low testosterone and false accusations of veganism might play well to the online far right, but will they win an election?

news.title: Meta Copies Snapchat’s Homework Again With ‘Plus’ Features for Instagram and Facebook
news.snippet: Meta’s upcoming Instagram Plus and Facebook Plus subscriptions are the latest example of the company seeing what works elsewhere and mimicking it.

news.title: Here Comes Ojai, Waymo’s New Chinese-Made Robotaxi
news.snippet: The pale-blue Ojai vehicles will start picking up members of the public in California and Arizona in the next few weeks.

news.title: Oura’s New Ring 5 Is Smaller and Lighter—and Adds an AI Health Coach
news.snippet: It’s slimmer, lighter, and more durable. But the real upgrade is Oura’s push into AI-powered health insights and proactive monitoring.

news.title: Cotopaxi Allpa 35L Travel Pack Del Día Dark: Sustainable and Chic
news.snippet: Created from fabric scraps that would otherwise end up in a landfill, this thoughtfully constructed bag looks great and can carry everything you need for a weeklong trip.

news.title: New Moms Are Returning to Coding Jobs Radically Reshaped by AI
news.snippet: New mothers working in software development are staring down an AI-pilled workplace they barely recognize.

news.title: Vertu Is Back With a Folding Phone Powered by—Surprise—an AI Agent
news.snippet: The beleaguered luxury phone maker is pushing the AlphaFold, which has decent specs and comes with Vertu’s new Hermes Agent on board, to wealthy would-be buyers.

news.title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
news.snippet: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

news.title: Waymo dominates autonomous vehicle registrations as Tesla trails behind
news.snippet: A new law and AV tracker tool gives the clearest accounting yet of how many robotaxis and self-driving trucks are in Texas.

news.title: The internet is being rebuilt for machines
news.snippet: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.

news.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
news.snippet: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

news.title: Hackers are trying to steal Signal users’ backups in new wave of phishing attacks
news.snippet: A new hacking campaign is trying to trick Signal users to give up their secret recovery key, which can be used to access online backups containing past messages.

news.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
news.snippet: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

news.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
news.snippet: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

news.title: H1 secures $40M from CVS, proving SaaS startups can still attract investment
news.snippet: CEO Ariel Katz argues that while AI can replicate workflow SaaS, it can't copy H1’s unique doctor data.

news.title: A security lapse at prison pay phone service Pay Tel publicly exposed over 300K callers’ driver’s licenses
news.snippet: Pay Tel secured the publicly exposed data after security researchers discovered the leak containing callers' sensitive ID documents and inmate communications.

news.title: Why Paris may be the most important AI city outside Silicon Valley
news.snippet: Europe’s startup ecosystem has matured significantly; its founders are increasingly willing to scale companies domestically instead of immediately looking to relocate to the U.S.

news.title: 36氪首发 | 李泽湘系投过的星空摄影设备品牌再获数百万美金融资，产品即将登陆众筹
news.snippet:
作者 | 乔钰杰
  编辑 | 袁斯来
  硬氪获悉，星空原野（重庆）科技有限公司（以下简称“星空原野”）近日完成新一轮融资，由线性资本独家投资数百万美金，安可资本担任公司独家财务顾问。此前公司曾获明月湖国际智能产业科创基地（XbotPark 重庆）孵化基金，及重庆市种子投资基金投资。
  星空原野成立于202

news.title: 「卡玺CardChic」  获天使轮融资，以中国文化IP＋精品化打造收藏卡品牌 | 36氪首发
news.snippet:
文 | 小葵
  编辑 | 刘士武
  36氪获悉，专注于中国文化IP的精品卡牌发行品牌「卡玺CardChic」近日已完成近千万级人民币天使轮融资。本轮资金将用于重磅IP的签约储备、产品工艺升级以及新一代TCG对战卡牌的研发与推广。 
  卡玺CardChic创办于2025年，总部位于杭州。核心团队中，创始

news.title: 半年访谈600+用户、获千万元融资，这名清华毕业生想把脑机“戴”进运动场｜早期项目
news.snippet:
文｜胡香赟
  编辑｜海若镜
  “运动场景中的脑状态监测，正在成为高水平训练和运动健康管理中的新需求。”创业两年，张昊天这样判断。
  张昊天毕业于清华大学，研究生期间开始探索如何将脑机接口技术应用在C端场景。他坦言，自己最初也没想好具体的落地方向，研究过程中，团队陆续接触过一些运动类企业，发现“重视运动表现结果的场景，对大脑状态监测都存在一定需求

news.title: 快手基本面韧性凸显，可灵AI成第二增长曲线
news.snippet:
封面来源 |  官方供图
  5月27日，快手（证券代码：1024.HK）公布了2026年一季度财报。
  财报显示，快手在2026年一季度实现营业收入337亿元，同比增长3.4%，符合市场预期；利润方面，同期实现经营利润36亿元，同比减少15.6%；同期经调整净利润录得34亿元，对应的经调整净利率为10%

news.title: 科氪 | 雷神联合AMD发布覆盖三大形态AI工作站产品矩阵
news.snippet: 5月28日，雷神在北京举办以《聚势共生 智算同行》为主题的AI工作站新品发布会，正式推出覆盖塔式、迷你PC和移动三大类别的AI工作站全场景产品矩阵。这是业内首批完成三大形态全覆盖的AI工作站产品发布，以行业领先的品类矩阵和旗舰级算力水准，重新定义了AI工作站的性能基准。

news.title: 拼多多推动生态治理常态化：上半年出台40余项举措 主动筑牢合规防线
news.snippet: AI技术应用越广泛，越要守住合规底线。近日，拼多多发布公告称，禁止平台商家发布及售卖AI押题、AI数据投毒、AI托管网络账号、AI起号、转售AI虚拟账号等相关服务、课程及工具。以AI押题为例，治理范围不仅涵盖以AI押题工具为核心卖点的商品，更延伸至其他各类隐蔽化、变相化服务。比如，一些商家借语文、数学、英语等不同科目，售卖所谓的“押题卷”。此类商品一经发现，将从严处置。

news.title: 腾讯云AI加速出海 ：Agent基建升级，WorkBuddy、Miora全球上线
news.snippet: 5月28日，在香港Tencent Cloud Day 上，腾讯云宣布面向 Agent完成全栈升级，新升级 Agent Runtime构建覆盖运行、存储、记忆与安全访问的Agent Infra原生底座。腾讯云国际化进一步加速，腾讯 WorkBuddy、AI 创意工作室 Miora、大模型服务平台 TokenHub 正式面向海外市场开放。腾讯公司高级执行副总裁、云与智慧产业事业群

news.title: 一个时间更早、热点更高的年中大促，和它带来的交易新节奏
news.snippet: 2026年夏天还没到，一场围绕它的电商战事已经提前在海外悄然打响。亚马逊今年Prime Day从传统的7月提前至6月23日至26日，促销提报在3月24日就已全面开启。卖家的夏季备战周期整体前移了至少一个月。另一边，被业界认为是对标Prime Day的TikTok Shop年中大促也在6月18日启动，时间更早、跨度更长，覆盖美区、英国、欧盟四国、墨西哥和日本等多个市场

news.title: 华为全面升级星河 AI 网络，Token 生产效率提升 2 至 5 倍
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，昨日，华为数据通信创新峰会 2026· 中国在上海举行，大会吸引了 800 余位行业领袖、技术专家和生态伙伴参与。华为此次围绕智联与安全两大核心能力，对星河 AI 网络全系列产品和解决方案进行了系统性升级。华为数据通信产品线总裁王雷在会上表示，AI Agent 的大规模应用正驱动网络向两个方向全面升级：一方面是面向 AI 的智联升级，打造以 To

news.title: 华为超新星手表 X1 系列开售：首搭 HarmonyOS 6.1、支持跨品牌加好友，1598 元起
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，华为超新星手表 X1 系列今日 10:08 正式开售。系列新品分为标准版和 Pro 款，首搭 HarmonyOS 6.1 系统（华为终端鸿蒙智能设备操作系统软件 V6.0）、支持与小天才等品牌儿童手表跨品牌加好友等功能。

news.title: 消息称微软有望携手英伟达在台北电脑展公布 N1/N1X 芯片版 Surface 笔记本

news.title: 比亚迪天神之眼 C 平台今年将 OTA 升级准城市领航功能：搭载无图端到端大模型，可达天神之眼 4.0 水平
news.snippet: IT之家 5 月 29 日消息，在昨晚举行的发布会上，比亚迪公布了天神之眼智驾系统的一系列新动作，覆盖系统升级、选装方案与安全服务等多个层面。就天神之眼 C 版本而言，比亚迪宣布该系统将跳过此前规划中的“城市记忆领航”功能，直接升级为基于无图端到端架构的天神之眼 4.0 版本，实现所谓的“准城市领航”能力 —— 即在不依赖高精地图的前提下，于城区道路提供领航辅助驾驶体验。该功能

news.title: Snowflake绩后暴涨36%：AI拐点已至，还是数据云的又一次虚晃？
